title: Tech Disruptors: SailPoint’s Mills on Governance for AI Agents
title_cn: 技术颠覆者：SailPoint 的人工智能代理治理工厂
summary: The governance landscape for AI agents is evolving amid new developments around agentic workflows, says SailPoint President Matt Mills. He joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Mandeep Singh on this episode of the Tech Disruptors podcast. The conversation also explores how agentic AI could reshape identity governance, from internal functions and product capabilities to potential shifts in pricing models and customer adoption.

title: China Bets Big on Green Hydrogen: Analyst Reaction (Podcast)
title_cn: 中国在绿色氢能上押下重注：分析师反应（播客）
summary: China is emerging as the standout exception in the global hydrogen market. While many countries are scaling back ambitions, Beijing has set a new target to increase green hydrogen production eightfold by 2030, a level that could make it the world’s largest producer and account for roughly half of BloombergNEF’s projected global output that year. The strategy is about more than decarbonization. China sees green hydrogen as a way to strengthen energy security, reduce reliance on imported oil and g

title: US Service Sector Expands at a Slower Pace, Hiring Picks Up
title_cn: 美国服务业扩张速度放缓，招聘增加
summary: The US service sector expanded in June at a slightly slower pace, but firms boosted payrolls as cost pressures eased.

title: US Service Sector Expands at a Slower Pace
title_cn: 美国服务业扩张速度放缓
summary: The US service sector expanded in June at a slightly slower pace, with the Institute for Supply Management’s services index decreasing 0.5 point to 54. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rogers Pays $3.1 Billion for Full Control of NBA, NHL Teams
title_cn: 罗杰斯斥资 31 亿美元完全控制 NBA、NHL 球队
summary: Rogers Communications Inc. agreed to buy the remaining 25% stake in Maple Leaf Sports & Entertainment Ltd. for C$4.35 billion ($3.1 billion) from billionaire Larry Tanenbaum’s Kilmer Group, taking full ownership of Canada’s largest sports empire.

title: Gold Falls as Traders Assess Fed Rate Outlook Ahead of Minutes
title_cn: 由于交易员在会议纪要前评估美联储利率前景，金价下跌
summary: Gold dropped as traders weighed the outlook for the Federal Reserve’s interest rate path at the start of a week in which the minutes of the US central bank’s last meeting are expected to shed light on policymakers’ thinking.

title: Argentina Targets Investment Grade Rating by 2031, Caputo Says
title_cn: 卡普托表示，阿根廷的目标是到 2031 年获得投资级评级
summary: President Javier Milei’s administration is targeting investment-grade status for Argentina by the end of a potential second term in 2031, Economy Minister Luis Caputo said Monday.

title: Chip Stocks Rally in AI Trade Revival After Plunge: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 暴跌后，芯片股在人工智能贸易复苏中反弹：市场结束
summary: A rebound in chipmakers lifted stocks as dip buyers emerged amid speculation that the artificial-intelligence trade that has powered the bull market has more room to run. The dollar rose. Oil steadied.

title: Tech Stocks Rebound as Dip Buyers Pounce on Chip Pullback
title_cn: 科技股反弹，因芯片回调而买家纷纷涌入
summary: US stocks climbed on Monday as investors jumped on technology shares after the artificial-intelligence trade notched one of its sharpest pullbacks in more than two years.

title: Lockheed to Buy Ultra Maritime for $3.45 Billion in Sea Push
title_cn: 洛克希德公司将以 34.5 亿美元收购 Ultra Maritime 进行海上推进
summary: Lockheed Martin Corp. agreed to buy naval defense business Ultra Maritime, which focuses on submarine detection systems, for $3.45 billion as the US defense giant broadens its undersea weapons portfolio.

title: Oil Holds Loss as Saudi Arabia Slashes Prices to Asian Buyers
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯向亚洲买家大幅降价，油价下跌
summary: Oil held onto its recent run of losses after Saudi Arabia slashed its flagship oil prices as traders look for clues on shipments through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: HSBC’s Kettner Sees Hyperscalers Back in Favor Amid ‘Melt-Up’
title_cn: 汇丰银行的凯特纳认为超大规模企业在“融化”中重新受到青睐
summary: Investors who recently scorned so-called hyperscalers are starting to come back as the companies show they can mint profits while spending hundreds of billions of dollars on artificial-intelligence infrastructure, according to Max Kettner of HSBC Holdings Plc.

title: Saudis Slash Main Oil Price to Rare Discount as Market Dives
title_cn: 随着市场跳水，沙特将主要石油价格大幅下调至罕见折扣
summary: Saudi Arabia made big reductions to its main crude oil prices for buyers in Asia, selling barrels at a discount for the first time since it embarked on a price war in 2020, as a surge of global supply heightens competition to find buyers.

title: Hungary Is Selling €3 Billion in Post-Orban Eurobond Return
title_cn: 匈牙利在欧尔班后欧洲债券回归中出售 30 亿欧元
summary: Hungary is selling €3 billion ($3.4 billion) at its first international bond issuance since Viktor Orban’s ouster in April’s election triggered a plunge in borrowing costs.

title: BlackRock, Vanguard ETFs Diverge Over 170% AI-Fueled Rally
title_cn: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 和先锋 (Vanguard) ETF 的分歧超过 170% 人工智能推动的反弹
summary: For more than a decade, investors could treat the two biggest emerging-market exchange-traded funds as almost interchangeable.

title: Container Carriers Eye Return to Red Sea Route
title_cn: 集装箱运输公司着眼于重返红海航线
summary: A.P. Moller-Maersk A/S and Hapag-Lloyd AG signaled confidence about resuming passage through the Red Sea, sending the container carriers’ shares down on expectation a return to the shorter route will ease capacity constraints and temper a surge in shipping rates.

title: Grains Move Higher as Weather Concerns Loom Over US, Europe
title_cn: 由于天气问题笼罩美国和欧洲，谷物价格走高
summary: Soybean and corn futures in Chicago jumped as traders turned their attention to weather concerns looming over crop development.

title: Iran Will Stay in Control of Hormuz, Treyz Says
title_cn: 特雷兹表示，伊朗将继续控制霍尔木兹
summary: Henrietta Treyz, Veda Partners director of economic policy research, discussed expectations for the upcoming NATO summit, oil prices and how Iran will stay in control of the Strait of Hormuz after the war is over. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley’s Wilson Sees Rotation From Chips to Hyperscalers
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的威尔逊认为从芯片到超大规模的转变
summary: US stocks will struggle to reach new highs as investors rotate out of some of this year’s biggest winning technology trades, according to Morgan Stanley strategists.

title: Treon: Companies Increasingly Struggling With Supply
title_cn: Treon：供应日益困难的公司
summary: Anneka Treon, ING Global Head of Private Banking, Wealth Management & Investments, joins Bloomberg’s Vonnie Quinn on “Bloomberg Brief” to discuss how investors are navigating through various supply shocks.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi Eyes Stronger Indo-Pacific Ties Amid Mixed US Signals
title_cn: 在美国发出的喜忧参半的信号中，莫迪着眼于加强印太关系
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi heads to Indonesia, Australia and New Zealand this week to shore up ties with Indo-Pacific nations as questions grow over the US’s commitment to the region and China’s influence expands.

title: Return of the Right Sparks Record Inflow to Chile Peso Bonds
title_cn: 权利回归引发智利比索债券创纪录的资金流入
summary: Foreign investors are piling into Chile’s local government debt at the fastest pace on record, attracted by a weaker peso, the prospect of interest rate cuts and the return of a more market-friendly government.

title: Europe’s Equity Bankers Bet on Capex Wave to Ride Out IPO Slump
title_cn: 欧洲股票银行家押注资本支出浪潮能渡过IPO低迷期
summary: Record spending on AI infrastructure and power grids is fueling a flurry of capital raises by listed companies, giving bankers one of their busiest starts in years and eclipsing the slowdown of initial public offerings in the region.

title: Quant Hedge Funds Extend Worst Run Since 2023 as Momentum Slides
title_cn: 随着动能下滑，量化对冲基金延续 2023 年以来最差表现
summary: A violent rotation in the underbelly of a bullish stock market is extending the worst run for quantitative hedge funds since 2023.

title: Tech Leads Stock Futures Higher; Trump Heads to NATO Summit | Bloomberg Brief 07/06/2026
title_cn: 科技股引领股指期货走高；特朗普前往北约峰会|彭博简报 07/06/2026
summary: US equity futures rise in a tech rebound as SK Hynix is set for a US listing this week. Oil slumps as flows through the Strait of Hormuz are restored after some tanker U-turns and after OPEC+ members agree to a modest rise in oil supply next month. Presidents Donald Trump and Volodymyr Zelenskyy are expected to meet at a NATO summit in Turkey. Anneka Treon of ING discusses the earnings environment and the impact of supply shocks in markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OPEC+ Emerges From War to Threat of Oil Surplus
title_cn: OPEC+从战争转向石油过剩威胁
summary: Key members have agreed on another production hike, yet there may be little need for the extra barrels.

title: SK Hynix Awaits US Debut, Trump Set to Travel to NATO Meeting | The Opening Trade 7/6/2026
title_cn: SK海力士等待美国首秀，特朗普将前往北约会议|开盘交易 7/6/2026
summary:
This week’s $28 billion US stock-market listing for SK Hynix Inc. may be the biggest-ever first-time share sale by a foreign company, but it isn’t just about raising cash. It’s also about competing in the hottest corner of the global stock market — memory chips used in AI computing.

US President Donald Trump will arrive in Turkey on Tuesday to meet leader Recep Tayyip Erdogan before a NATO summit. Trump will also meet Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy at the defense alliance's gathering in Ankara.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EasyJet’s Stock Shows Castlelake Bid Is Far From a Done Deal
title_cn: 易捷航空的股票显示卡斯尔莱克的出价还远未完成
summary: EasyJet Plc stock traded well below Castlelake LP’s latest takeover bid, signaling investors remain concerned about the potential barriers facing the £5 billion-plus deal.

title: Mamoon Hamid on Learning from Startups
title_cn: Mamoon Hamid 谈向初创公司学习
summary: Barry sits down with Kleiner Perkins Partner, Mamoon Hamid. They discuss Mamoon's thoughts on the AI revolution and his approach to early AI investing.  Mamoon also breaks down how he became an early investor in giants like Slack, Figma, and how Kleiner Perkins assesses the investments they missed.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ondas to Buy Autonomous Aircraft Maker DZYNE for $875.8 Million
title_cn: Ondas 将以 8.758 亿美元收购自主飞机制造商 DZYNE
summary: Ondas Inc. agreed to buy autonomous aircraft maker DZYNE Technologies in an $875.8 million cash-and stock-deal that positions Ondas as a full-service autonomous defense technology platform.

title: Microsoft’s Xbox to Cut 3,200 Jobs, Divest Five Studios in Major Overhaul
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 将裁员 3,200 人，并剥离 5 个工作室进行重大改革
summary: Compulsion and Double Fine studios will become independent; Undead Labs and Ninja Theory will be sold. Xbox will also look to sell or spin out Arkane Studios.

title: Broadcom, Apple Extend Tie-Up to 2031 With New Custom Chips
title_cn: Broadcom 与 A​​pple 通过新型定制芯片将合作关系延长至 2031 年
summary: Broadcom Inc. said that it will provide new custom chips to Apple Inc. in an expanded partnership that now runs through 2031.

title: Microsoft’s Xbox to Cut 3,200 Jobs as Part of Massive Reorganization
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 将裁员 3,200 人，作为大规模重组的一部分
summary: Microsoft Corp.'s Xbox plans to eliminate 3,200 jobs, or around 20% of its staff over the next year, as part of a massive reorganization to spur growth in the struggling gaming division. Jason Schreier reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Novartis Buys Cancer-Drug Firm Myricx for Up to $1.5 Billion
title_cn: 诺华 (Novartis) 以 15 亿美元收购癌症药物公司 Myricx
summary: Novartis AG agreed to buy British biotech Myricx Bio for as much as $1.5 billion, adding an experimental cancer drug designed to deliver more potent treatments directly to tumors while limiting damage to healthy cells.

title: HSBC's Kettner Says `Melt-Up' Set to Boost Hyperscalers
title_cn: 汇丰银行的凯特纳表示，“熔化”将推动超大规模企业发展
summary: Max Kettner, chief multi-asset strategist at HSBC, says the ``melt-up'' moment in tech stocks is set to swing momentum back to the hyperscalers. He speaks on Bloomberg Television's ``Surveillance.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Memory Chipmaker SK Hynix Kicks Off $28 Billion US Listing
title_cn: 存储芯片制造商 SK Hynix 启动 280 亿美元美国上市
summary: SK Hynix Inc. kicked off the formal marketing process for its US listing on Monday, as the South Korean chipmaker looks to capitalize on surging investor demand for the high-flying memory-chip sector.

title: Jobs Report Won't Sway Fed That Much, Berro Says
title_cn: 贝罗表示，就业报告不会对美联储产生太大影响
summary: Kelsey Berro, Fixed Income Portfolio Manager at JPMorgan Asset Management, discussed the Federal Reserve's monetary policy outlook, indicating that a rate hike in July is probably off the table and she expects the Fed to stay on hold for the year. Berro also says while the recent payrolls report suggests the labor market is stable, it's not going to decisively influence Fed decisions. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mike Wilson Sees Semiconductor Stocks Correcting
title_cn: 迈克·威尔逊（Mike Wilson）认为半导体股票正在调整
summary: Morgan Stanley Chief US Equity Strategist Mike Wilson says investors are rotating out of some of the year's biggest winning technology trades. He says hyperscalers will stabilize and semiconductors stocks will correct. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amundi Says European Industrials to Benefit From AI Boom
title_cn: Amundi 表示欧洲工业将受益于人工智能热潮
summary: Amundi Investment Institute Head Monica Defend explains where she sees value in the AI supply chain. "Industrial is going to be a key sector because of its weight on on the market and because this is the sector where we have the AI enablers," Defend tells Bloomberg Television. "This is where we think the value and the performance might come from." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Reddit Is Cracking Down on AI Marketing Slop With Its Own AI
title_cn: Reddit 正在利用自己的人工智能来打击人工智能营销失范
summary: Reddit Inc. is battling a new kind of spam: stealth marketing content created by brands that want to get mentioned by popular artificial intelligence chatbots like ChatGPT and Gemini.

title: Tencent Seeks to Sell Up to $1.6 Billion Stake in Kuaishou
title_cn: 腾讯拟出售最多 16 亿美元的快手股份
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is seeking to raise as much as $1.55 billion in a selldown of part of its stake in short-video app operator Kuaishou Technology through a block trade.

title: Sony’s All-Digital PlayStation Strategy Doesn’t Sit Well With Gamers
title_cn: 索尼的全数字 PlayStation 策略并不适合游戏玩家
summary: The former champion of sharing-friendly policies has changed

title: ITV to Sell Broadcasting Unit to Sky for Up to £1.6 Billion
title_cn: ITV 将以高达 16 亿英镑的价格将广播部门出售给 Sky
summary: ITV Plc has agreed to sell its media and entertainment arm to Comcast Corp.-owned Sky Group Ltd. in a deal worth as much as £1.6 billion ($2.1 billion) including debt, a move that will reshape the UK television industry.

title: Standard Bank Warns of Flight From Sovereign Debt as Safety Ebbs
title_cn: 标准银行警告称，随着安全形势的恶化，人们将逃离主权债务
summary: Investors seeking to insulate their portfolios against turbulence should increasingly look beyond government bonds, which appear to be losing their traditional safe-haven status, according to Standard Bank’s head of G10 strategy.

title: Ready for the Future, Ireland Is Also Vulnerable to It
title_cn: 为未来做好准备，爱尔兰也很容易受到影响
summary: Ireland may be a bellwether for how an economy can bet its future on technology and lose.

title: South Korea's SK Hynix, Samsung to Put AI Trade to the Test | The Pulse 7/6/2026
title_cn: 韩国 SK 海力士、三星将考验人工智能贸易 |脉搏 7/6/2026
summary:
South Korea’s memory giants will put the artificial-intelligence trade to yet another test this week. Samsung releases earnings on Tuesday. Investors are also getting ready for SK Hynix’s massive US listing days later.

Eleven people were killed and 60 injured in a deadly overnight attack in the Ukrainian capital, Kyiv, on the eve of the NATO summit in Ankara where President Donald Trump is due to meet with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy.

Shares in UK budget carrier EasyJet soared after it agreed in principle to a takeover offer of more than £5 billion from US firm Castlelake. The bid was Castlelake’s fifth, after the two sides sparred over several weeks.

Today's guests: Monica Defend, Amundi Investment Institute Head; Elisabeth Braw, Atlantic Council Senior Fellow (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore Files New Charges in Nvidia Chip Fraud Case
title_cn: 新加坡对 Nvidia 芯片欺诈案提出新指控
summary: Singaporean prosecutors filed additional charges including money laundering against a key suspect in an AI server fraud case, part of the Southeast Asian nation’s growing efforts to clamp down on Nvidia Corp. chips being diverted illicitly to other locations including China.

title: Stalled AI Rally Has More Eyeing Old-Guard Stocks, Markets Pulse Survey Says
title_cn: 市场脉搏调查显示，停滞的人工智能涨势吸引了更多关注的老牌股票
summary: Growing doubts about the sustainability of the AI rally are pushing more investors toward old-economy stocks, according to the latest Markets Pulse survey.

title: Ireland's US-Exposed Tech Sector Faces AI Job Disruption
title_cn: 爱尔兰受美国影响的科技行业面临人工智能就业中断
summary: Ireland's technology sector, heavily exposed to US multinationals, is facing widespread AI-driven labor market disruption and declines in its high tech employment rates. Bloomberg's Olivia Fletcher has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Supplier Unimicron Seeks $1.4 Billion in GDS Offer
title_cn: Nvidia 供应商欣兴电子寻求 14 亿美元的 GD​​S 报价
summary: Unimicron Technology Corp. is seeking as much as $1.4 billion from a sale of global depositary shares, according to terms of the deal seen by Bloomberg News, capitalizing on an artificial-intelligence frenzy that has lifted the Taiwanese chip supplier’s stock more than 700% over the past 12 months.

title: Apple Supplier Luxshare Said to Plan Pricing HK Listing at Top
title_cn: 苹果供应商立讯精密计划香港上市定价最高
summary: Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. is poised to raise HK$24.3 billion ($3.1 billion) after telling prospective investors it wants to price shares for its Hong Kong listing at the maximum amount it had set, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Fincantieri Speeds Subsea Buildout With Deals to Buy Four Firms
title_cn: 芬坎蒂尼集团收购四家公司加速海底建设
summary: Fincantieri SpA agreed to buy majority stakes in four underwater technology companies, boosting the Italian shipbuilder’s presence in a growing part of Europe’s military buildout.

title: These Are the Sharps Actually Making Money on Prediction Markets
title_cn: 这些是真正在预测市场上赚钱的人
summary: What it takes to win on Kalshi and Polymarket.

title: Odd Lots: The Sharps Who Dominate Prediction Markets (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的群体：主导预测市场的锐利者（播客）
summary: Here’s a couple things about prediction markets. A lot of it is pure gambling and speculation, much of it on things with very little economic relevance. Another fact is that in all likelihood, if you yourself started trading right now, you’d probably lose your shirt. But there is money being made by some dedicated traders, really focused on areas like politics and economics. On this episode, we speak with Brian Golden and Daniel Reichman, who are part of a private Discord called MAGA Kiwi Club,

title: Kioxia to Draw $18.5 Billion Inflows on Topix Review, SMBC Says
title_cn: SMBC 称 Kioxia 将在 Topix 审核中吸引 185 亿美元资金流入
summary: Kioxia Holdings Corp. shares may see passive inflows of ¥3 trillion ($18.5 billion), because of the potential jump in its weighting on the benchmark Topix index, according to SMBC Nikko Securities Inc.

title: Turkey Cracks Down on Press as NATO Leaders Gather in Ankara
title_cn: 北约领导人齐聚安卡拉，土耳其打压媒体
summary: Turkish authorities are escalating a years-long crackdown against perceived critics in the run up to this week’s NATO summit in Ankara, in a show of intolerance toward dissent.

title: NATO's Rutte Addresses Press Ahead of Summit in Ankara
title_cn: 北约秘书长吕特在安卡拉峰会前向媒体发表讲话
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte speaks to reporters in Ankrara ahead of the alliance's summit in the Turkish capital. "After years of under-investment, we are producing real capabilities," Rutte says. "European allies and Canada are now on a trajectory to equalize the defense spending with the United States," he adds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Hits Russia’s Biggest Refinery Amid Fuel Crunch
title_cn: 乌克兰因燃料短缺而袭击俄罗斯最大炼油厂
summary: Ukraine struck three Russian refineries, including the country’s biggest, in the latest attack on energy assets that is deepening a nationwide gasoline shortage.

title: Canada Poised to Pick Germany’s TKMS in Submarine Deal Worth Billions
title_cn: 加拿大准备在价值数十亿美元的潜艇交易中选择德国的 TKMS
summary: Canada is expected to enter into talks with Germany’s Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems to build a new fleet of submarines in one of the largest military procurements in the country’s history.

title: Trump’s Other Billionaire Envoy Keeps Busy in Mideast Heartland
title_cn: 特朗普的另一位亿万富翁特使在中东中心地带忙碌
summary: The Trump administration’s Middle East diplomacy is mostly about crisis management right now, but one key envoy has been quietly working on longer-run plans to tilt the region in a US-friendly direction.

title: Trump Rings Market Opening Bell From White House
title_cn: 特朗普在白宫敲响开市钟
summary: President Donald Trump rang the opening bell for the New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq from the Oval Office to mark the launch of Trump Accounts, a new investment vehicle for American children. The government will contribute $1,000 to the accounts of children born between 2025 and 2028. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Rings Opening Bell in Oval Office, Hails Trump Accounts
title_cn: 特朗普在椭圆形办公室敲响开门钟，赞扬特朗普的账目
summary: President Donald Trump rang the opening bell for the New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq from the Oval Office, a celebratory event to mark the launch of Trump Accounts, a new investment vehicle for children.

title: Berlin’s January Power Outage Was Terror Attack, Commission Says
title_cn: 委员会称柏林一月停电是恐怖袭击
summary: A five-day power outage in Berlin in January was caused by a terrorist attack, a state-appointed commission said, describing the incident as a “wake-up call” for cities across Germany.

title: US to Resume Troop Rotation in Poland, Defense Minister Says
title_cn: 国防部长称美国将恢复在波兰的驻军轮换
summary: The US will resume troop rotation in Poland, overturning an earlier decision that led to a strain in ties between the two North Atlantic Treaty Organization allies, Poland’s top defense official said.

title: Trump to Meet Zelenskyy, Wary Allies at NATO Summit
title_cn: 特朗普将在北约峰会上会见泽伦斯基及其警惕的盟友
summary: President Donald Trump will meet with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy at a NATO summit in Turkey on Wednesday. He's also going to keep pushing alliance members to spend more on defense. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall reports from Washington. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Mulls 0% Income Tax to Draw Money to New Financial Hub
title_cn: 印度尼西亚考虑实行零所得税以吸引资金到新金融中心
summary: Indonesia is planning sweeping tax incentives for a proposed international financial center, including an effective 0% income tax rate for some businesses and foreign finance experts.

title: Europe’s Bank Woes Are About Scale, Not Capital, EU Argues
title_cn: 欧盟认为欧洲银行的困境在于规模而非资本
summary: Europe’s lenders are being dragged down by a “chronic lack of scale,” not high capital requirements, European Union officials have argued, as they laid the groundwork for a regulatory revamp that’s unlikely to deliver the capital cut some bankers pushed for.

title: Trump Expands the Presidency. Will Democrats Change Course?
title_cn: 特朗普扩大总统任期。民主党会改变路线吗？
summary: Democrats face dilemma over how permanent the shifts should be

title: Israel Cabinet Threatens to Defy Supreme Court as Election Looms
title_cn: 选举临近，以色列内阁威胁藐视最高法院
summary: Israel’s government said it won’t respect a Supreme Court ruling on a broadcast regulatory body, prompting accusations that it’s paving the way to a constitutional crisis ahead of national elections.

title: Why Europe Fears Trump’s Next Moves on NATO
title_cn: 为什么欧洲担心特朗普对北约的下一步行动
summary: US allies are bracing for unpleasant surprises at NATO’s annual summit in Ankara on July 7-8. President Donald Trump is still smarting from Europe’s reluctance to support his war in Iran, and has questioned why the US should continue to defend the continent when allies don’t reciprocate by supporting American interests.

title: Germany Calls TKMS Bid to Build Canadian Submarines ‘Unbeatable’
title_cn: 德国称 TKMS 建造加拿大潜艇的投标“无与伦比”
summary: The German government voiced optimism that Canada will opt for a bid led by ThyssenKrupp Marine Systems to build a fleet of submarines in a deal worth tens of billions of dollars.

title: China Sentences Official to Death Over $325 Million in Bribes
title_cn: 中国判处受贿超过 3.25 亿美元的官员死刑
summary: A Chinese court handed a rare death sentence to a former official on corruption charges, in a severe punishment underscoring the intensity of President Xi Jinping’s anti-graft crackdown.

title: $2 Trillion Race to Control Future Battlefields
title_cn: 2万亿美元争夺未来战场控制权
summary: More than $2 trillion is being poured into the global arms race as nations attempt to be the first to master drones, hypersonic weapons, AI and other emerging technologies that may dominate future battlefields. Bloomberg's Gerry Doyle reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canadians Skeptical of Carney’s Push to Open Airports to Private Investment
title_cn: 加拿大人对卡尼推动向私人投资开放机场持怀疑态度
summary: A slim majority of Canadians oppose allowing private investment in airports, a new poll shows, as Prime Minister Mark Carney explores selling stakes in the publicly owned facilities to unlock funding for major infrastructure projects.

title: NATO’s Biggest Mission Is Keeping Trump Happy
title_cn: 北约最大的使命是让特朗普高兴
summary: Western defense alliance is beholden to what the US leader says and thinks.

title: Philippines Arrests Duterte-Allied Senator for Plunder Charge
title_cn: 菲律宾以掠夺罪名逮捕杜特尔特盟友参议员
summary: Philippine authorities arrested a senator charged with plunder, hours before the Senate started the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte on Monday, in a move that may impact the vote in proceedings that could determine Duterte’s political future.

title: Europe Pledged to Rearm. How’s That Going?
title_cn: 欧洲承诺重新武装。怎么样？
summary: Russian expansionism and US plans to dial down involvement in NATO are forcing European nations to rebuild military capabilities that have atrophied since the Cold War.

title: China Holds Rare Test of Sub-Launched Missile in Pacific Ocean
title_cn: 中国在太平洋举行罕见的潜射导弹试验
summary: China test-fired a ballistic missile from a nuclear submarine in the Pacific Ocean, drawing criticism from Japan, New Zealand and Australia, and underscoring its efforts to project power in the region.

title: China Releases Pastor After Trump Raised Case With Xi
title_cn: 特朗普向习近平提出申诉后，中国释放牧师
summary: China has released the leader of a prominent underground church from detention in a conciliatory gesture after US President Donald Trump personally raised the case with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

title: Russia Strike Exposes Ukraine Air Defense Gap Before NATO Summit
title_cn: 北约峰会前俄罗斯空袭暴露乌克兰防空缺口
summary: A deadly overnight attack on the eve of the NATO summit highlighted Kyiv’s growing vulnerability as shortages of US-made Patriot air defenses become acute and peace talks remain stalled.

title: Australia-Fiji Sign Security Deal, Expand China Containment
title_cn: 澳大利亚与斐济签署安全协议，扩大对华遏制
summary: Australia and Fiji signed a mutual defense treaty and a new agreement to develop ties, in a significant development in Canberra’s campaign to shore up its influence in the South Pacific and limit China’s influence.

title: Farage Denies Wrongdoing Over Gifts From Convicted Criminal
title_cn: 法拉奇否认对被定罪罪犯的礼物有不当行为
summary: Nigel Farage denied any wrongdoing over gifts he received from a convicted criminal, as pressure grows on the Reform UK leader over his finances.

title: President Trump Prepares for NATO Summit | Daybreak Europe 7/6/2026
title_cn: 特朗普总统为北约峰会做准备|欧洲黎明 7/6/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, stocks in Asia pared gains as a rebound in technology stocks stalled. Investors cautious ahead of earnings from Samsung and SK Hynix ADRs listing in the US on Friday.

NATO leaders are due to convene at the military alliance's annual summit starting in Turkey on Tuesday. President Trump will meet Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy at the meeting in Ankara on Wednesday.

And EasyJet has agreed in principle to a takeover offer of more than £5 billion from Castlelake. The offer of £6.90 per share in cash was Castlelake’s fifth bid.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Strike on Kyiv Kills 11 Ahead of NATO Summit
title_cn: 北约峰会前夕俄罗斯对基辅的袭击造成11人死亡
summary: Russia carried out a massive air attack on Ukraine a day before the leaders of NATO countries are set to meet for their annual summit. Eleven people were killed and 46 injured in the overnight strikes on Kyiv that caused damage in four districts of the city, according to a post on Telegram by Mayor Vitali Klitschko. Bloomberg's Anthony Halpin reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
